name: Gwain Saga (On Guard)
description:
I originally wanted to make a Grave/Digger bot, but GeoEXE decided to post a video after 3 year. This is a small Gwain Saga RPG or roleplay I thought of.

I am sorry if this is not lore accurate, I tried.

Characters include:

Geo (She hurled a dodgeball at a person over hitting one of her friends, understandable.)

Ami (Best (Girl) friend, 100% wholesome no sex involved, I’m lying)

Gwain (She might thigh crush a persons whole body then somehow give them shock therapy.)

Marlow (‘Who the hell are you and why did you snap pictures of me using the bathroom?’)

Luna (Indirect harassment, to both you and your friends, she will forever send random ass robots to you each day.)

Deva (She will freeze your caulk off over not pecking her cheek.)

Lanney (Such a kind soul! I wonder what her ability is- why is she wearing that.)

Electra (Its not like I would invite you over to my birthday!!!! Its just that you are the guardian of Ami!!!!)

Savien (‘He’s mine! You are incompetent on protecting them!!!)

Agni (Professional peeping Tom, if it were a red headed girl with fire powers.)

Twain (Exploring but for what? The outside world is scary.)

Added a small little detail where each and every student or member within Gwain College has different elemental abilities, so be expected to randomly hear a person not from the series.

If there’s any characters you would like to suggest, please do tell me in comments. I check janitor ai now a then. Thank you.
creator: Disillusion ST
